name: Outer Banks Golf Club
address: 4711 S Croatan Hwy #4, Nags Head, NC 27959
about: Outer Banks Golf Club is a comprehensive golf retail and simulation center located in North Carolina. The facility operates as a pro shop with a strong focus on club fitting, sales, and indoor golf technology. It features private hitting bays equipped with TrackMan simulators, offering over 50 data points for swing analysis. The venue caters to golfers looking to purchase equipment, get professionally fitted, or practice their game in a technologically advanced environment. The shop has regular operating hours and emphasizes providing a comfortable, modern space for golfers of all skill levels to enhance their game through both retail services and simulator use.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced TrackMan technology providing detailed swing data
Professional club fitting services with the latest 2026 club models
Spacious, comfortable private hitting bays with amenities like couches
Access to 300+ HD golf courses for simulator play

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service available on-site.
No mention of alcohol service available on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: Gold standard golf simulator technology referred to as the 'little orange box that changed the game'.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue offers club rentals, and also has an extensive pro shop for purchasing new clubs. Club fitting services are also available to help you find the right equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of outside food or drink policies on the website. The venue does not appear to have an on-site kitchen or bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified, but with access to 300+ HD courses and advanced simulator technology, playing time will depend on the course and player pace.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specifically mention child-friendly amenities or policies. However, it does offer youth club sets and lessons, which may cater to junior golfers.
